title: NoWindChargeParticles
description: Removes the particles from the wind charge.
body:
# NoWindChargeParticles

This Minecraft mod removes the visual particles created by Wind Charges to give you a cleaner and less distracting gameplay experience. It is designed for MacePVP players who want to get rid of the extra visual clutter that can get in the way during combat, movement, or fast-paced situations.

## Before:

![before adding resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be131b43b21b5242a6c3c88f6501fc6939d89e78.gif)

## After:

![after adding the resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03cd46dd3f58083338c827f3b08e8ed2a57b312f.gif)

Instead of seeing constant particle effects when Wind Charges are used, the resourcepack simply suppresses or disables those visuals on the client side. This means the game still behaves exactly the same, but your screen stays clearer, especially in situations where multiple Wind Charges are being used at once or when fighting in tight spaces.

## Made mainly for MacePVP
